title: lilium farreri
intro: Lilium farreri, also known as the Turkestan lily or Martagon lily, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family. It is a perennial plant with fragrant, drooping flowers that are often used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Lilium farreri, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, are used to promote health and well-being, with benefits including reducing stress and improving sleep quality.
